issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for TypeORM operations.

scenarios.name: Define User entity with OneToMany Posts and email normalization
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses @PrimaryGeneratedColumn("uuid"), @OneToMany with inverse side, explicit authorId @Column on Post, and @BeforeInsert hook for normalizeEmail — baseline typically omits the lifecycle hook approach and the explicit FK column.

scenarios.name: Generate and run a TypeORM migration
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the exact npx typeorm migration:generate <path> -d src/data-source.ts and migration:run -d src/data-source.ts commands and warns against synchronize:true in production — baseline typically forgets the -d data-source flag.
